nodes.name: 皇鸠属
nodes.summary: 皇鸠属（Ducula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如Pink-bellied imperial pigeon、Mindoro imperial pigeon、Grey-headed imperial pigeon等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Seram imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: Seram imperial pigeon（Ducula neglecta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Seram imperial pigeon。

nodes.name: Seram imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: The Seram imperial pigeon (Ducula neglecta) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Indonesia where it is found on Seram and Ambon Islands in the Moluccas. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References
